mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_credit (user_id, total_credit, used_credit, available_credit, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalCredit}, #{usedCredit}, #{availableCredit}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_credit SET total_credit = #{totalCredit}, available_credit = #{availableCredit}, used_credit = #{usedCredit}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE user_credit SET available_credit = available_credit - #{amount}, used_credit = used_credit + #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND available_credit >= #{amount} AND status = 1
UPDATE user_credit SET available_credit = LEAST(available_credit + #{amount}, total_credit), used_credit = GREATEST(used_credit - #{amount}, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
